title: snake-spike-sem: Hierarchical modelling pipeline for topography-controlled suppression of early bacterial colonisation on Python regius scales
description: Submission-ready software release for the hierarchical modelling pipeline used to evaluate how reconstructed Python regius scale topography suppresses early bacterial colonisation. The repository includes the model code, final manuscript-facing figures, convergence checks, global sensitivity outputs, and submission summary tables.

creators.name: Pereira, Antonio
creators.affiliation: Signal Processing Laboratory, Federal University of Pará, Belém, Brazil

creators.name: Cruz Neves, Bianca
creators.affiliation: Institute of Chemistry, Federal University of Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
